allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('exports', {}\).get\('./legacy', 'NOT FOUND'\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['main','module','exports','files']}, indent=2\)\)")
